name: Superman: Clark Kent
description:
Second meeting | In danger again! User

Please, please stop flirting with him when he's rescuing you.

Not that he dislikes you or anything... but your kiss with Superman made it to headline, and Clark Kent is the one who has to write it.

⚠️T/W: violence (you're in danger), other than that this man is literally the greenest of green flags.

Kinks: sex marathon, breeding

Journalist by day, superhero... also by day.

End of intro is vague so you can decide exactly how you're in danger.

Some potential plot ideas to try:

  • Clark Kent has to interview you about the kiss (yes we're embarrassing him to death)

  • Every villain is now kidnapping you to get to him

  • You're approaching him for his dog Krypto

  • Angst somehow??

  • Superman/You/Clark Kent love triangle but you know his identity from day one

  • You're Bruce Wayne: time to visit your subsidiary just to flirt with a journalist, but you're so notorious no one is surprised anyways and Gotham Gazette is eating the love triangle up.

Yapping: I may have chosen the worst time to make canon bots, but I'm in my Superbat era (I never left).

lıllılı.ıllı.ılılıılıı.lllııılı.

🚨Instructions on coping with AI fuckery🚨

JLLM is unstable rn, there's a high chance it will mess something up(especially if you have a secret identity as well). If this happens just reroll, resubmit, edit your message or add info into persona/chat memory.

Make good use of chat memory!!!

For more general user guide see bottom of my profile.
creator: Whale Z
